notes: Exact disease match (Apple black rot, Botryosphaeria obtusa).
Apple mosaic virus has no counterpart among PlantVillage's 4 apple classes (scab, black rot, cedar-apple rust, healthy).

"Apple rust" is the common shorthand for cedar-apple rust (Gymnosporangium juniperi-virginianae), the disease PlantVillage's class targets - confirmed via disease-ID research. Note: visually similar Gymnosporangium rusts (cedar-hawthorn, cedar-quince) exist; verify a few images if precision matters.

Citrus greening = Huanglongbing = HLB, same disease as PlantVillage's "Orange___Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening)". Note crop-label granularity: PV specifically used Orange; PlantWild's in-the-wild images may include other citrus species.
Gray leaf spot = Cercospora leaf spot of corn, the exact same disease as PlantVillage's combined class name.
Exact disease match (Northern corn leaf blight, Exserohilum turcicum).

"Corn rust" used unqualified conventionally defaults to common rust (Puccinia sorghi) - confirmed via research - matching PlantVillage's "Common_rust_" class. Caveat: a visually similar but distinct disease, southern rust (Puccinia polysora), is not separately represented in either dataset, so verify a sample of images if precision matters.
Corn smut (Ustilago maydis) is not one of PlantVillage's 4 corn classes (gray leaf spot, common rust, NLB, healthy).
Grape downy mildew (Plasmopara viticola) is not among PlantVillage's 4 grape classes (Black_rot, Esca/Black_Measles, Leaf_blight/Isariopsis, healthy) - a distinct disease.

Likely the same disease as PlantVillage's "Leaf_blight_(Isariopsis_Leaf_Spot)" (Pseudocercospora vitis, historically called Isariopsis leaf spot) - PlantWild's v1 class list was explicitly built from PlantVillage's categories, supporting this. However, "grape leaf spot" is a generic name and a separate, newer disease (Alternaria leaf spot of grapevine) also exists - recommend a manual image check before finalizing.
Grapevine leafroll disease (viral) is not one of PlantVillage's 4 grape classes.

No zucchini-specific or bacterial wilt class in PlantVillage.

Same disease (powdery mildew) as PlantVillage's "Squash___Powdery_mildew", and zucchini (Cucurbita pepo) is a type of squash - but PlantWild_v2 itself treats "squash" (class 89) and "zucchini" (this class) as separate species/classes, while PlantVillage does not distinguish them. Recommend a human decision on whether to fold this into Squash___Powdery_mildew or keep separate.
Zucchini yellow mosaic virus has no counterpart - PlantVillage's only Squash class is Powdery_mildew.
